A. The system exhibits several issues, including ignoring other agents' suggestions (repeatedly prompting for a solution despite being told it's unsolvable), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing simplified implementations instead of addressing the core issue), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code), disobeying task specifications (not fully implementing functions), premature termination (failing a task due to access token issues), step repetition (repeating the same thought or information), and weak verification (failing to identify critical errors). There are also instances of information withholding and loss of conversation history.
